title: 'Time to say goodbye' :Jeffrey Epstein's suicide note revealed via former cellmate account, remains sealed by court
summary_full: A recently surfaced report reveals Jeffrey Epstein penned a note before his 2019 death in a New York federal jail. Discovered by his cellmate, Nicholas Tartaglione, the handwritten message, now sealed by a judge, reportedly asserted Epstein's innocence and included the poignant phrase, "Time to say goodbye.
